name: haive-monorepo
description: hAIve — repo-native context enforcement for AI coding agents

scripts.publish:all: pnpm -r build && pnpm -r test && pnpm --filter @hiveai/core publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @hiveai/embeddings publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @hiveai/mcp publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @hiveai/cli publish --access public --no-git-checks
